item.title: Truth
item.description: I have a PhD (in mathematics). Nobody ever questions my use of the title "Dr". But my next door neighbor, who is an MD, always gets queried.
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Heard you weirdos like old timey historical photos.
item.description:
Found all these in an ancient family photo album. Not sure who most of the people are but I understand I’m related to most of them. This photo strikes me because of the date. 3 days before the stock market crash. Look at how carefree they were.
A relative wearing his uniform from WW1.
Apparently I had a great aunt who died in childbirth. The baby boy was going to be named Aloysius. Neither of them survived. Her remaining children often visited the grave of their mother.
The writing on this photo is pretty self explanatory.
It’s fun to think about people having pets more than 100 years ago. And guinea pigs no less!
This photo is from the early 1920s. People were looking pretty fly for a hike!
Just guys being dudes.
This one struck me because that’s actually my grandfather on the left. I’ll be hiking at Mount Baldy this week for the first time. It’s been almost 100 years since that photo. As far as I know no member of my family has been there since.
Gotta love the beachwear.
I wish I had more context for this photo. The film “A League of Their Own” comes to mind. “Marla Hooch...what a hitter!!”
Just a sled ride in the Southern California mountains.
Snow day!
This photo is from 1907 or 1908.
Feed a deer? Why not?
I like knowing that even more than 100 years ago people were still total goofballs.
I’d love to know what they ate at that picnic.
Cold beer is timeless.
Every always seemed dressed up.
I bet they were up to no good.
A beer and a smoke. Unwinding after a long day.
Classy car.
Santa Monica has changed A LOT since this photo was taken.
Dog tax!!!
item.dc:creator: idonotsow

item.title: Haven't done a dump in a while.
item.description:
This is all stuff I yoinked from Imgur way back when I first started yoinking stuff. Enjoy!
Sea slug tax, except I put googly eyes on it. Have a good week, my friends.

item.title: What's the worst costume to wear to an Aquarium on Halloween?
item.description: Her name is Ambrosia. She's a mollusk and she has feelings.
item.dc:creator: Walmartstallwithnolock

item.title: Biden has been INCREDIBLY successful. Don't let Republicans/Russians control the narrative.
item.description: Russian propaganda mills are attempting to make "He's not perfect" seem like "He's just as bad as Trump" in order to drive down engagement, which works directly to help the Republican agenda. Don't fall for it!
item.dc:creator: Nobodyn0se

item.title: Hello?
item.description: The video version of people who split important messages into separate parts and slowly sending each line out. Edit: Thanks for the Most Viral, everyone. This nincompoop here is overwhelmed.

item.title: Passerby Runs Into Burning House And Saves 2 Young Kids, 3 Teens
item.description: His name is Nicholas Bostic https://twitter.com/LafayetteINPD/status/1547657887165468677 https://www.huffpost.com/entry/nicholas-bostic-fire-saves-5-people-kids_n_62d2cd67e4b0f69130305973 FP edit: Thanks for the accolades!
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: Of saboteurs and saboteurs
item.description: People say he still votes more democrat. He is pro-life. He voted against Obama energy plans, and now this. How is he still better than a Republican? I bet he agrees to vote democrat in small issues, and when it counts his loyalty is to the right. Coal-black hearted bastard! EDIT: To the people saying that because I'm pointing out Manchin's treachery I'm killing the elections come November, this is such a juvenile argument that it blows my mind.
item.dc:creator: BreakingMango

item.title: The phone clearance continues

item.title: My favorite recent craft projects
item.description:
In this post I will share some of my favorite recent crafting projects. I’ve put links in the descriptions to the original posts. - My submission for #fieldday #partsandcrafts Above: Follow me eyes tests https://imgur.com/gallery/6IDrEGg
Pop-up game cards with lock mechanism https://imgur.com/gallery/q9sJJ3V
Simplified paper enigma for decoding numbers https://imgur.com/gallery/nU62GZi
Experimenting with Micro LEDs and copper tape https://imgur.com/gallery/8E8B9F9
How to make plastic rivets for paper projects https://imgur.com/gallery/9zKbDYZ
Paper Beast https://imgur.com/gallery/yUt9vVk
This is fine pop-up card. More pop-up memes: https://imgur.com/gallery/tibUhgV
Hellraiser Lament configuration cube https://imgur.com/gallery/pOyMRli
“Low budget” cardboard virtual pinball cabinet using the Nintendo Switch: https://imgur.com/gallery/koP3RoG
LED panel using Christmas smart lights: https://imgur.com/gallery/3dKkXzL
(Sound on) Fully functional Nintendo LABO pop-up piano https://imgur.com/gallery/nU62GZi
More about my hobby, making pop-up cards https://imgur.com/gallery/HrKym2p
item.dc:creator: PaulDeGraaf
